_meta.purpose: Standard steel section catalog for FCL.
_meta.usage: Call sections using std.key and pass only span.
rules: Do not pass h, b, t or any section dimensions.
_meta.sourcing: Dimensions per EN 10365 (IPE/IPN/HE/UPE), DIN 1026-1 and EN 10279 (UPN), EN 10056-1 (angles), EN 10210-2 and EN 10219-2 (hollow sections). Root radii where EN is silent follow ArcelorMittal commercial rolling convention. This is a public preview — all dimensions to be verified manually against authoritative tables before beta launch.
